headline: Pinnacle West (PNW) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Pinnacle West (PNW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +910.81% and +6.42%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on AES Corporation Stock?
summary: AES Corporation has notably outperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts remain cautious about the stock’s prospects.
